---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: DineshWayaman
---

## Problem this solves

A clear description of the problem or limitation. E.g. "I need to detect when the user starts driving but there is no way to do that currently."

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you would like. Include what the API might look like if relevant.

```dart
// Example of how you imagine using it
await BeTrackyBackgroundLocation.startService(
  ...
  newParam: value,
);
```

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches or workarounds you have tried.

## Additional context

Links to similar features in other packages, research, or any other context.
